title: Speaking for the trees: Why 81-year-old Jesse Logan advocates for ancient whitebark pine
description: "How can we help this charismatic species occupy emerging habitats? Can we really help them? I think we can, and I think we should," — Jesse Logan.

title: When ancient Nalanda University used to hold scholarly debates
description: At Nalanda University, President Murmu's recent convocation beautifully revives the legacy of ancient academia. Echoing the historical 'dikshant samaroh,' these ceremonies showcase lively debates and honor the true spirit of scholarship. Once, Nalanda attracted intellectuals from far and wide, celebrating enlightenment over mere diplomas—an inspiring reminder that wisdom transcends formalities.

title: Pennsylvania families are paying the price for Trump’s fossil fuel addiction | Opinion
description: As gas prices soar past $4 and electricity costs jump 13%, Harrisburg must invest in clean energy to break our dependence on volatile foreign oil markets and protect ratepayers.
